infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Memet Live needs camera access so you can go live and stream video to your viewers.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Memet Live needs microphone access so your viewers can hear you while you stream.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Memet Live to access your camera to go live.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Memet Live to access your microphone to go live.
Allow Memet Live to access your microphone to go live.
